title: Better Snowy Terralith
description: Version of "Better Snowy Biomes" to support Terralith
body:
Hey, this is Better Snowy Terralith, the version to make compatibility between [Better Snowy Biomes](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-snowy-biome) and [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith).

 
### How to load

You need to use this Datapack and Terralith 2.5.7. Both must be datapacks. Make sure that Better-Snowy-Terralith is on top of the datapack-list (look in gallery). 

You can also use Terratonic.

Mod versions will be added later.

### Features

_Snow under trees; Snowy Leaves_
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23c590da72f4a1ae2ced6d7fa36ee12ea73a62d7.jpeg)

_Real Snowy Plains_
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03978fd5e2ecaff026d7a2f8f9a0bff5b1c6257f.jpeg)
